title: Black Flash
description: This is a mod which basically adds a small chance that you'll land a Super Critical Hit whenever you directly hit an opponent with any melee means.
body:
This is a mod which basically adds a small chance that you'll land a **Super Critical Hit** whenever you directly hit an opponent with any melee means. This means, any weapon but indirect sources such as TNT, throwable projectiles, arrows & etc don't apply. 

This mod is heavily inspired by the _Black Flash Mechanic from the Jujutsu Kaisen Anime & Manga_. it's essentially a mod that adds black flash to minecraft. Currently, the odds of landing a black flash cannot be tweaked and are hard coded as follows:

- 1 in 9 chance of landing a black flash bare handed
- 1 in 32 chance of landing a black flash with any other item in hand
  
Aside from that, a theme/music plays when you land a black flash with any other item (not bare handed). This mod is very small but adds a whole new mechanic for pvp. 

The black flash has a few effects. Upon landing a black flash, the user gains insane regen for 5 seconds (effectively immortal unless one shot in those 5 seconds), they also gain saturation for 2 seconds (restore a bit of hunger ASAP), they also gain the strength effect for 25 seconds. The entity that got hit by the black flash gains slowness (stun effect) such that they can barely move, for 2 seconds. A black flash also does 4 extra damage (that's 2 hearts of a fully UNARMOURED player) and deals tons of knockback.

 

Enjoy!
